title: A Critical Nuclear Site in Iran Is Spared During U.S.-Israeli Airstrikes, for Now
summary_full: The Isfahan facility, suspected of storing a cache of enriched uranium, was smashed during the 12-day campaign last June.
summary_public: The Isfahan facility, suspected of storing a cache of enriched uranium, was smashed during the 12-day campaign last June.
